parameters.query: SELECT id, opp_title as opportunity_name, agency, estimated_value, stage, gda_label FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label = 'PURSUE' AND stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won') AND (gda_score IS NULL OR gda_score = 0) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 20

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'No unscored PURSUE opps today' } }];
